tier_1.notes: All 4 artifacts non-empty and well-structured. REQ count stable at 48 (confirmed by grep-count of REQ- IDs). Track 3 remains 11 agents. All 5 Phase 2 roadmap discrepancies still addressed in REQ-META-1. MINOR-justification (REQ-META-2) preserved. Out-of-Scope §5 still CLOSED (items 1-16, no 'etc.'). User Gate 1 REWRITE-scope override preserved at 16 (honors 'ALL candidates' intent per Gate 1 decision JSON). F1-F10 from round 1 are mechanically closed per the changelog. However, the revision introduced two documentation inconsistencies (see findings) that degrade lint_clean — the AC count header in formal-criteria.md contradicts the summary table and revision note within the same file. No_regressions set to false because a small documentation regression was introduced by the revision itself.

tier_3.notes: Weighted via (correctness*0.25 + completeness*0.2 + security*0.2 + maintainability*0.15 + robustness*0.2) = 5*0.25 + 5*0.2 + 5*0.2 + 3*0.15 + 5*0.2 = 1.25+1.0+1.0+0.45+1.0 = 4.7. Using same scheme as round 1 (4.55 → 4.6 net gain). Correctness up (+1): F1/F2/F3/F4 closed, REQ-T1-9 hard equality at 204, REWRITE=16 fully reconciled, V6100_TOUCHED has a single formal definition at top of Scope Freeze. Completeness unchanged (5): all four files still cover all REQs/ACs with traceability. Security unchanged (5). Maintainability DOWN (-1): new documentation regressions introduced by revision — AC count header in formal-criteria.md line 8 still says '77' while summary table line 490 and revision note line 492 say '79'; V6100_TOUCHED Section 1 formula uses a per-track decomposition (Track 2=11, Track 3=5, Track 1=3) that does not match the Net-new enumeration in traceability.md (Track 2=9, Track 3=5, Track 1=4), though the totals still sum to 19. Robustness up (+1): Appendix A Commander gate-execution protocol is now explicit (10 rows, each with command + log path + grep pattern + failure semantics); REQ-T2-FALLBACK abort-lane preserved; research artifact schema machine-checkable; T2-ADV-3 disclosure now unconditional.

closed_findings: f-t1-1-retire-count-internal-inconsistency (RETIRE frozen at 4 with inlined rationale; AC-T1-1-1 matches; downstream refs aligned)
f-t1-9-harness-count-mismatch (REQ-T1-9 hard equality 204 = 185 baseline + 19 net-new; AC-T1-9-1 '== 204'; traceability + design §8.4 aligned)

f-req-t1-2-ambiguous-promotion (2 orphan scenarios (pipeline-history-pii-scope, pipeline-paused-webhook) assigned REWRITE entries #15 and #16; traceability §A rows added; Tier-A list expanded to satisfy REQ-T1-18 ≥8 bound)

f-missing-research-deliverables (Phase 5 Step 1 placement explicit; REQ-T2-8 research artifact schema defined in design.md §10; AC-T2-8-1 machine-checkable against the 5-section schema; REQ-T2-FALLBACK routing explicit)

f-ac-t2-2-grep-pattern-underspecified (REQ-T2-3 reframed: file-set frozen + residual permissive pattern count = 0 + imperative template count ≥ 37; '42' demoted to informational; AC-T2-3-3 added for file-set completeness)
still_open_from_round_1: f-out-of-scope-item-numbering (MINOR — flat 1-16 numbering across 5.1-5.4 subsections; not addressed in revision; remains MINOR; not blocking PASS)
new_major_introduced_by_revision: Total ACs header in formal-criteria.md:8 says 77 but summary table (line 490) + revision note (line 492) say 79 — intra-file inconsistency introduced by F6 + F8 revisions
new_minor_introduced_by_revision: V6100_TOUCHED Section 1 per-track decomposition (Track 2=11 vs actual 9 net-new; Track 1=3 vs actual 4 net-new) — totals still reconcile to 19 but decomposition is off
AC-T1-7-1 uses '50 ± drift' fuzzy wording while design.md §4.2 states hard equality '== 50' — machine-check tightness inconsistency

findings.description: formal-criteria.md line 8 states 'Total ACs: **77** across 48 REQs' AND 'no new ACs added', which contradicts (a) the summary table at line 490 stating Total = 79 (30+23+18+8), and (b) the revision note at line 492 explicitly stating 'Revision round 1 added: +1 AC at REQ-T2-3 (AC-T2-3-3 file-set completeness), +1 AC at REQ-T2-10 (AC-T2-10-2 T2-ADV-3 unconditional disclosure)'. The revision changelog (revision-round-1.md) confirms 77 → 79 (2 new ACs). The header was not updated during the F6/F8 revisions. Downstream tooling or Phase 8 Commander reading the header line will under-count by 2.
findings.recommendation: Update formal-criteria.md line 8: change 'Total ACs: **77**' to 'Total ACs: **79**' and replace 'no new ACs added' with 'AC-T2-3-3 and AC-T2-10-2 added in revision round 1'. Single-line fix; does not require cascading edits since the summary table and bottom note are already correct.

findings.description: The V6100_TOUCHED formal definition decomposes net-new as 'Track 2 = 11 files (REQ-T2-2/3/4/5/6/7/9/10/12/13)' and 'Track 1 = 3 files (REQ-T1-4/7/13/15 → 4 REQs but overlapping files count 3)'. Actual mapping in traceability.md §Net-new (and design.md §8.4): Track 1 net-new = 4 files (items 1-4: no-awk-source, fixtures-helpers-contract, contributing-security-section, changelog-v6100-entry); Track 2 net-new = 9 files (items 5-13); Track 3 net-new = 5 files (items 14-18); META net-new = 1 file (item 19). The Section 1 formula's TOTAL sum-check still yields 50 (the Track 2 = 11 / Track 1 = 3 double-miscount cancels out the META = 0 omission), but the per-track decomposition is inaccurate. A Phase 5 reader reconciling track-by-track will hit spurious gaps.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite requirements.md lines 42-49 as: 'Track 1 net-new = 4 files (REQ-T1-4/7/13/15); Track 2 net-new = 9 files (REQ-T2-2/4/5/6/7/9/10/12/13); Track 3 net-new = 5 files (REQ-T3-1/4/6/8/12); META net-new = 1 file (REQ-META-1); sum 19.' Keeps bottom-line 50 intact.

findings.description: AC-T1-7-1 uses '50 ± drift' as the cardinality check for the TOUCHED_SCENARIOS array, while design.md §4.2 line 324 states the hard equality 'Expected: ${#TOUCHED_SCENARIOS[@]} == 50'. A '± drift' clause weakens machine-checkability — Phase 8 Commander cannot automate this without a tolerance bound specified numerically. Given that F3 froze the harness at hard-equality 204, consistency suggests the TOUCHED_SCENARIOS cardinality should also be hard equality 50.
findings.recommendation: Change AC-T1-7-1 wording from '50 ± drift' to '== 50' (hard equality). Pair with a note that if Phase 5 legitimately needs to expand the set, REQ-T1-7 and this AC must be re-frozen in lockstep.

findings.description: Carried over from round 1 — Out-of-Scope items use flat numbering 1-16 across 5.1/5.2/5.3/5.4 subsections. Not addressed in revision round 1. AC-META-1-2 and AC-META-1-3 reference '#1/#2/#3' and 'items 4-9' which work today but would break if Phase 5 renumbers. Not blocking.
findings.recommendation: Defer to a future hygiene pass OR add a stability note 'items are numbered flat 1-16 and Phase 5 MUST NOT renumber.' MINOR — does not block PASS.

regression_check.summary: One documentation regression introduced by the revision (AC count header not updated after F6+F8 added 2 ACs). F1-F5/F7-F10 fixes are clean — no regressions beyond the header drift.
regression_check.round_1_hash_collision_check: Computed hashes for round-2 findings are 229f809a8e9578f7, 70d1c6534ce660c7, 82935dacdf68e405, bc0446d99a6c0896. Round 1 findings used semantic IDs (e.g., f-t1-1-retire-count-internal-inconsistency). No collision. STOP-3 not triggered.
